# 量化交易

量化交易 is a core concept in finance and economics. Closely related to [[jpmorgan]], [[goldman-sachs]], [[risk-management]], [[algorithmic-trading-ml]], [[lstm-network]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph. See also [[flash-boys]].
